flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Tougaloo College are 22% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($34.7k vs $44.8k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.9% at Tougaloo College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($23.1k debt amortized over 10 years vs $34.7k earnings).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tougaloo College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.9k → $12.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tougaloo College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.9k → $12.4k).
